correlation.interpretation: A single massive thermal cluster encompasses 49 of 50 machines (M-2 through M-50) with maximum propagation risk (1.0), indicating near-certain cascade potential. Root cause traced to M-13, the thermal origin point. The fully-connected topology (1225 edges) means no natural isolation barriers exist between machines. High-graph-score machines M-28 (0.1078), M-9 (0.0982), M-22 (0.0974), M-33 (0.0946), and M-46 (0.0912) represent critical propagation nodes that could accelerate thermal cascade across the entire cluster. A failure at M-13 will propagate to all 49 machines with certainty unless immediate isolation is achieved.
recommended_actions: Immediately cool and isolate M-13 to eliminate the thermal root source before cascade initiates
Deploy emergency thermal barriers around high-propagation nodes M-28, M-9, M-22, M-33, and M-46 to disrupt the most active transmission paths
Segment the monolithic 49-machine cluster into smaller isolated thermal zones with independent cooling to break the fully-connected topology
Implement predictive thermal monitoring on all 49 machines with automated shutdown triggers at 80% thermal threshold
Establish thermal isolation corridors between machine groups to reduce edge connectivity from 1225 to below critical cascade threshold

scheduling_llm.assessment: Infeasible/Invalid solution. The simulated annealing algorithm returned an empty schedule, resulting in a zero-cost but completely non-operational outcome. A 100% improvement over the greedy algorithm is an artifact of the null state, not a valid optimization.
adjustments: Add a hard constraint to reject empty schedules during SA evaluation.
Penalize unscheduled machines heavily in the cost function to prevent the algorithm from selecting the null state.
Re-run the optimization ensuring a minimum threshold of scheduled machines.
scheduling_llm.human_readable_summary: Hasil optimasi Simulated Annealing gagal menghasilkan jadwal yang valid karena menghasilkan jadwal kosong (tidak ada mesin yang dijadwalkan) dengan biaya dan waktu henti nol. Meskipun terlihat sebagai peningkatan 100% dibandingkan metode greedy, jadwal kosong ini tidak dapat diterapkan secara operasional. Penyesuaian diperlukan pada algoritma untuk menolak solusi kosong dan memberikan penalti yang besar pada mesin yang tidak dijadwalkan sebelum menjalankan ulang optimasi.

report.raw: Ringkasan pemantauan 1 Mei 2026: dari 50 mesin terpantau, terdapat 14 mesin berisiko SEDANG yang memerlukan perhatian. Tidak ditemukan mesin berisiko TINGGI, namun pemantauan berkala pada mesin-mesin berisiko sedang tetap disarankan. Saat ini belum ada jadwal pemeliharaan yang tercatat.

output.interpretation: A single massive thermal cluster encompasses 49 of 50 machines (M-2 through M-50) with maximum propagation risk (1.0), indicating near-certain cascade potential. Root cause traced to M-13, the thermal origin point. The fully-connected topology (1225 edges) means no natural isolation barriers exist between machines. High-graph-score machines M-28 (0.1078), M-9 (0.0982), M-22 (0.0974), M-33 (0.0946), and M-46 (0.0912) represent critical propagation nodes that could accelerate thermal cascade across the entire cluster. A failure at M-13 will propagate to all 49 machines with certainty unless immediate isolation is achieved.
recommended_actions: Immediately cool and isolate M-13 to eliminate the thermal root source before cascade initiates
Deploy emergency thermal barriers around high-propagation nodes M-28, M-9, M-22, M-33, and M-46 to disrupt the most active transmission paths
Segment the monolithic 49-machine cluster into smaller isolated thermal zones with independent cooling to break the fully-connected topology
Implement predictive thermal monitoring on all 49 machines with automated shutdown triggers at 80% thermal threshold
Establish thermal isolation corridors between machine groups to reduce edge connectivity from 1225 to below critical cascade threshold

output.assessment: Infeasible/Invalid solution. The simulated annealing algorithm returned an empty schedule, resulting in a zero-cost but completely non-operational outcome. A 100% improvement over the greedy algorithm is an artifact of the null state, not a valid optimization.
adjustments: Add a hard constraint to reject empty schedules during SA evaluation.
Penalize unscheduled machines heavily in the cost function to prevent the algorithm from selecting the null state.
Re-run the optimization ensuring a minimum threshold of scheduled machines.

Meskipun terlihat sebagai peningkatan 100% dibandingkan metode greedy, jadwal kosong ini tidak dapat diterapkan secara operasional. Penyesuaian diperlukan pada algoritma untuk menolak solusi kosong dan memberikan penalti yang besar pada mesin yang tidak dijadwalkan sebelum menjalankan ulang optimasi.

Tidak ditemukan mesin berisiko TINGGI, namun pemantauan berkala pada mesin-mesin berisiko sedang tetap disarankan. Saat ini belum ada jadwal pemeliharaan yang tercatat.
